articles.title: 美国发布对华半导体出口管制新规 中方表示坚决反对
articles.content: 美国商务部工业与安全局 10 月 7 日发布了针对中国的最新出口管制规定，扩大了对先进计算芯片、含此类芯片的计算机商品和某些半导体制造设备的限制。新规将 14 纳米及以下逻辑芯片、128 层及以上 NAND 闪存、18 纳米及以下 DRAM 内存的相关设备和技术纳入管制。此外，美国还将多家中国实体列入实体清单。中方对此表示坚决反对，认为这一举措违背了市场经济原则和公平竞争规则。

articles.title: U.S. unveils sweeping export controls on chips to China
articles.content: The U.S. Commerce Department's Bureau of Industry and Security on Friday unveiled a sweeping set of export controls aimed at slowing China's technology and military advances. The rules restrict the sale of advanced computing chips, the export of equipment used in chip manufacturing, and require licenses for U.S. persons working at certain Chinese chipmakers. Logic chips at 14nm and below, NAND with 128 layers or more, and DRAM at 18nm or below now fall under the restrictions. The Commerce Department also added several Chinese entities to the Entity List, citing national security concerns.

articles.title: U.S. Tightens Curbs on Chip Exports to China in Major Escalation
articles.content: Washington's latest action represents one of the most aggressive uses of export controls against Beijing, marking a significant departure from earlier targeted bans on individual companies. Industry analysts said the rules would substantially affect Chinese efforts to build advanced semiconductors domestically and could disrupt global supply chains. Companies including Applied Materials, KLA and Lam Research are expected to face significant compliance costs.

articles.title: 美国对华芯片出口管制新规涉及面广 影响全球产业链
articles.content: 业内专家分析指出，美国此次出口管制新规涉及面之广前所未有，不仅针对成品芯片，还覆盖芯片制造设备、设计软件以及在华工作的美国籍技术人员，对全球半导体产业链将产生显著冲击。多位中国半导体企业负责人表示，将通过加大研发投入、寻求替代供应链等方式应对。同时，部分美国半导体设备厂商也表达了对市场损失的担忧。

articles.title: 商务部回应美方半导体出口管制新规
articles.content: 针对美国商务部发布对华半导体出口管制新规，中国商务部新闻发言人发表声明，表示中方对此坚决反对。声明指出，美方做法违反国际贸易规则，严重损害中国企业的合法权益，破坏全球半导体产业链供应链稳定。中方敦促美方立即纠正错误做法，停止滥用出口管制措施，并将采取必要措施，坚决维护中国企业的合法权益。

articles.title: China lodges 'solemn representations' over US chip curbs
articles.content: China's Ministry of Commerce said Beijing had lodged solemn representations with Washington over the new export controls, calling the measures an abuse of export-control practice that violates international trade rules. The ministry said the policy will damage the stability of global supply chains and harm Chinese firms' legitimate rights. Chinese officials said necessary measures will be taken to protect Chinese enterprises, though they did not specify retaliatory steps.

articles.title: 荷兰加入对华半导体设备出口限制 ASML 对华业务受冲击
articles.content: 据多方消息，荷兰政府已与美国、日本达成协议，将限制阿斯麦（ASML）等本国半导体设备制造商向中国出口先进光刻设备。这一限制不仅包括最先进的 EUV 光刻机（此前已禁止出口），还将扩展到部分高端 DUV 浸没式光刻机。ASML 此前曾警告，对华出口限制可能影响公司未来收入预期。中国是 ASML 第三大市场，2022 年贡献了约 14% 的销售收入。

articles.title: Netherlands and Japan Sign On to U.S. Chip Curbs Against China
articles.content: The Netherlands and Japan have agreed to join the U.S. in restricting exports of advanced chipmaking equipment to China, expanding the global push to limit Beijing's access to cutting-edge semiconductor technology. ASML, the Dutch supplier of lithography equipment essential for advanced chip production, will face new restrictions on certain DUV systems in addition to the existing EUV ban. Japanese firms including Tokyo Electron and Nikon will also be subject to new export rules.

articles.title: Dutch and Japanese chip equipment curbs mark allied front against China
articles.content: The deal, struck in Washington after months of diplomatic negotiations, marks a significant alignment of allied policy on technology controls against China. Industry sources said the trilateral agreement is critical because U.S. controls alone could not effectively constrain Chinese chip development without cooperation from the Netherlands and Japan, which dominate key segments of the equipment supply chain.

articles.title: 华为 Mate 60 Pro 搭载麒麟 9000S 引发产业链关注
articles.content: 华为于 8 月 29 日开放 Mate 60 Pro 销售，新机搭载自研麒麟 9000S 处理器。多家分析机构通过拆解证实，该芯片由中芯国际采用其 N+2 工艺生产，相当于 7nm 节点。这是中国本土半导体产业在受到美国出口管制后取得的重要进展。业内人士表示，虽然在工艺成熟度和良率上仍有挑战，但本次发布显示中国大陆已具备 7nm 级别芯片量产能力。

articles.title: Huawei's New Phone Shows China Made 7nm Chip Despite U.S. Curbs
articles.content: TechInsights, a research firm, said the Kirin 9000S processor in Huawei's new Mate 60 Pro was made by China's Semiconductor Manufacturing International Corp using its N+2 process, equivalent to 7-nanometer technology. The discovery prompted U.S. officials to question the effectiveness of export controls intended to keep advanced chipmaking technology out of China. Analysts noted the breakthrough came despite SMIC being on the U.S. Entity List.

articles.title: Huawei phone teardown reveals China's chip progress, raising export-control questions
articles.content: The launch of Huawei's Mate 60 Pro during U.S. Commerce Secretary Gina Raimondo's visit to Beijing was widely seen as a symbolic statement. Members of Congress called for further tightening of export controls, while industry observers pointed to the substantial financial cost and yield challenges China faces in scaling such production. The chip's existence does not necessarily mean China can produce advanced chips at competitive cost or volume.

articles.title: 美方进一步收紧对华 AI 芯片出口管制 中方表示反对
articles.content: 美国商务部 10 月 17 日宣布更新出口管制规定，将更多面向中国市场的 AI 芯片纳入限制范围。新规填补了此前的'性能门槛'漏洞，将英伟达专为中国市场设计的降级版 A800 和 H800 芯片也纳入管制，并新增对从事中国 AI 芯片设计的子公司的限制。中国商务部新闻发言人就此回应称，美方滥用出口管制措施，严重违反市场原则和国际经贸规则。

articles.title: U.S. Tightens China's Access to A.I. Chips, Closing Loopholes
articles.content: The Biden administration on Tuesday issued new rules tightening restrictions on the sale of advanced semiconductors to China, closing loopholes that had allowed Chinese firms to acquire chips like Nvidia's A800 and H800 that were specifically designed to fall just below previous thresholds. The new rules also add restrictions on chip-design firms operating in China and impose new licensing requirements on shipments to a broader list of countries to prevent diversion to Beijing.

articles.title: New U.S. Chip Curbs Hit Nvidia and AMD's China-Specific Products
articles.content: Nvidia, AMD and Intel said they were assessing the impact of the rules. Nvidia's China-specific A800 and H800 chips, designed to comply with earlier rules by falling below prior performance limits, are now banned for export to China without a license. The Commerce Department said the moves are necessary to prevent China from acquiring computational power that could be used by its military.

articles.title: 习拜会在旧金山费罗丽庄园举行
articles.content: 中美两国元首在亚太经合组织领导人非正式会议期间于旧金山郊外的费罗丽庄园举行会晤。双方就中美关系战略性、全局性、方向性问题，事关世界和平与发展的重大问题进行了坦诚深入交流。会晤就稳定双边关系、恢复两军高层沟通、合作打击芬太尼及人工智能政府间对话等议题达成多项共识。中方强调，台湾问题始终是中美关系中最重要、最敏感的问题。

articles.title: Biden and Xi meet in California, agree to restore military communications
articles.content: President Biden and Chinese leader Xi Jinping met for nearly four hours at a country estate south of San Francisco, agreeing to restore high-level military-to-military communications and to cooperate on combating fentanyl trafficking. The two leaders also agreed to establish an intergovernmental dialogue on artificial intelligence. Despite the warmer tone, deep differences remained on Taiwan, technology controls and the South China Sea.

articles.title: 中方对美方加征关税表示强烈不满和坚决反对
articles.content: 针对美方宣布对华加征关税的最新举措，中国商务部新闻发言人 5 月 14 日发表谈话指出，美国不顾世贸组织规则和国际贸易准则，单方面对中国电动汽车、太阳能电池、锂电池等清洁能源产品大幅加征关税，是典型的政治操弄和保护主义行为。这些产品在国际市场上的竞争力源于充分的市场竞争和持续的技术创新，并非所谓的'产能过剩'或'政府补贴'。中方将采取必要措施坚决维护自身权益。

articles.title: Biden imposes 100% tariff on Chinese EVs, hikes tariffs on solar and chips
articles.content: President Joe Biden announced sweeping tariff hikes on Chinese clean energy products, raising tariffs on Chinese-made electric vehicles to 100% from 25%, doubling solar cell tariffs to 50%, and imposing new or higher tariffs on lithium-ion batteries, critical minerals, semiconductors and steel. The administration said the moves are needed to counter what it called China's unfair trade practices and to protect American manufacturers competing with subsidized Chinese rivals.

articles.title: Biden's China tariff hikes draw mixed reaction from US industry
articles.content: The 100% tariff on Chinese EVs may have limited immediate impact since few Chinese-built EVs are sold in the US, but tariffs on batteries and critical minerals could raise costs for American automakers and energy projects. Trade analysts said the move marks a continuation rather than a reversal of Trump-era trade policy and effectively forecloses bipartisan retreat from confrontation with Beijing on industrial policy.

articles.title: 对镓、锗相关物项实施出口管制公告
articles.content: 为维护国家安全和利益，根据《中华人民共和国出口管制法》《中华人民共和国对外贸易法》《中华人民共和国海关法》有关规定，经国务院批准，决定对镓、锗相关物项实施出口管制。自 2023 年 8 月 1 日起，未经许可，出口商不得出口下列物项，包括金属镓、氮化镓、氧化镓、磷化镓、砷化镓等八类镓相关物项，以及金属锗、磷锗锌、锗锭、二氧化锗等六类锗相关物项。

articles.title: China to restrict gallium and germanium exports in escalating tech war
articles.content: China announced it will impose export restrictions on gallium and germanium products from August 1, citing national security. The two metals are critical for semiconductor manufacturing, with China dominating global production - accounting for roughly 80% of gallium and 60% of germanium output. Industry analysts said the move is widely seen as Beijing's most direct retaliation to date against U.S.-led semiconductor export controls.

articles.title: China's metals curbs raise stakes in tech standoff with U.S.
articles.content: While the immediate impact of the gallium and germanium curbs may be limited, the move signals China's willingness to wield its leverage over critical materials. Analysts pointed to other materials—including rare earths and graphite—where China holds even greater market dominance. The action came days before U.S. Treasury Secretary Yellen's scheduled visit to Beijing aimed at stabilizing economic ties.

articles.title: 美方签署对华投资限制行政令 中方坚决反对
articles.content: 美国总统拜登 8 月 9 日签署行政令，限制美国实体在半导体与微电子、量子信息技术、人工智能三个敏感领域对华投资，要求美国企业进行投资前事先报告或禁止特定交易。中国商务部新闻发言人就此回应表示，美方此举严重背离市场经济和公平竞争原则，破坏国际经贸秩序，扰乱全球产业链供应链稳定，中方对此强烈不满和坚决反对。

articles.title: Biden Order to Restrict U.S. Investment in Chinese Tech
articles.content: President Biden signed an executive order restricting U.S. investments in certain advanced technology sectors in China, including semiconductors and microelectronics, quantum information technologies, and certain artificial intelligence systems. The order requires U.S. persons to notify the Treasury about transactions in covered technologies and prohibits some categories outright. Treasury officials said the rule targets a narrow slice of investment with national-security implications rather than broader commercial activity.

articles.title: DeepSeek-R1 发布震动 AI 圈 性能逼近 OpenAI o1 成本仅为零头
articles.content: 中国 AI 创业公司深度求索（DeepSeek）于 1 月 20 日发布 R1 推理模型并开源权重。该模型在多项推理基准上接近 OpenAI 的 o1 模型表现，但训练成本据公开报告仅为数百万美元量级，远低于美国头部公司的同类训练规模。R1 发布后迅速登顶 App Store 免费榜，引发美国科技股大跌。市场担忧 AI 训练算力需求和定价可能面临重估，英伟达单日市值蒸发近 6000 亿美元。

articles.title: Chinese AI Startup DeepSeek Triggers Tech Selloff
articles.content: DeepSeek's release of its R1 reasoning model, which the company said matches OpenAI's o1 on key benchmarks at a fraction of the training cost, sent shockwaves through global markets. Nvidia shares fell roughly 17%, wiping out close to $600 billion in market value—the largest single-day loss in U.S. stock-market history. Investors and policymakers questioned whether U.S. dominance in AI and the effectiveness of compute export controls might be overstated, given the apparent efficiency of Chinese model development.

articles.title: DeepSeek shock raises questions on US AI strategy and chip controls
articles.content: Researchers and analysts said DeepSeek's apparent cost efficiency raises uncomfortable questions for U.S. policymakers who have built export-control policy on the premise that compute is the key bottleneck for AI capability. While debate continued over actual training costs and what compute DeepSeek used, the episode has clearly eroded confidence that restricting access to top-end chips alone can keep China behind in AI development.

articles.title: 俄罗斯对乌克兰发起特别军事行动
articles.content: 俄罗斯总统普京 24 日宣布在顿巴斯地区发起特别军事行动。俄军从北部白俄罗斯方向、东部和南部克里米亚方向多线进入乌克兰境内。乌克兰总统泽连斯基宣布全国进入战争状态，并签署军事总动员令。联合国安理会就乌克兰局势召开紧急会议，多国宣布对俄采取制裁措施。

articles.title: Russia attacks Ukraine as defiant Putin warns US, NATO
articles.content: Russian forces launched a multi-pronged attack on Ukraine in the early hours of Thursday, with explosions reported in Kyiv, Kharkiv, Odesa and other cities. President Putin announced what he called a 'special military operation' to 'demilitarize and denazify' Ukraine. Western leaders condemned the assault as the most serious threat to European security since World War II and announced sweeping sanctions in response.

articles.title: 西方国家对俄实施前所未有的金融制裁
articles.content: 美国、欧盟、英国、加拿大宣布将多家俄罗斯主要银行剔除环球银行金融电信协会（SWIFT）系统，并冻结俄罗斯央行约 3000 亿美元海外外汇储备。德国宣布暂停北溪 2 号项目，欧盟决定向乌克兰提供武器援助。俄罗斯卢布兑美元汇率短期内大幅贬值，俄罗斯央行将基准利率从 9.5% 上调至 20% 以应对资本外流。

articles.title: West moves to cut Russian banks from SWIFT, freeze central bank assets
articles.content: The United States, European Union, United Kingdom and Canada agreed to remove selected Russian banks from the SWIFT international payments system and to impose restrictive measures on the Russian Central Bank, freezing roughly $300 billion in foreign exchange reserves. The actions are among the most far-reaching financial sanctions ever imposed on a major economy. The Russian rouble plunged against the dollar, prompting the Bank of Russia to raise its key rate from 9.5% to 20%.

articles.title: 北溪天然气管道发生水下爆炸 大量天然气泄漏
articles.content: 丹麦能源署、瑞典海事局先后报告北溪 1 号和北溪 2 号天然气管道在波罗的海水域发生水下爆炸，导致大规模天然气泄漏。瑞典地震学家确认爆炸前曾监测到两次明显的水下震动信号。各方就破坏责任互相指责，欧洲多国对关键基础设施安全发出警告。事件对欧洲冬季能源供应形势造成进一步压力。

articles.title: Nord Stream pipelines: 'Sabotage' suspected after gas leaks
articles.content: Sweden's coast guard reported a fourth leak from the damaged Nord Stream gas pipelines, while Sweden and Denmark said seismographs detected two undersea explosions before the leaks were discovered. Western governments said the damage appeared to be deliberate sabotage, though they stopped short of formally attributing responsibility. The incidents raised alarm over the security of European critical infrastructure.

articles.title: 乌克兰夏季反攻进展低于预期 西方援助效果引发讨论
articles.content: 乌克兰武装部队在 6 月初正式开启夏季反攻，主攻方向选择在扎波罗热州南部和巴赫穆特方向。然而经过数月作战，乌军并未取得预期突破，俄军坚固防线和密集雷场使进攻代价高昂。西方军事援助效果引发讨论，部分美欧专家承认对反攻成效估计过于乐观。

articles.title: Ukraine's Counteroffensive Stalls Against Russian Defenses
articles.content: Ukraine's much-anticipated counteroffensive, launched in early June with significant Western military support, has produced limited territorial gains and exposed the difficulty of breaking through layered Russian defensive lines reinforced with extensive minefields and fortifications. U.S. and European officials privately acknowledged that earlier expectations were overly optimistic, prompting reassessment of weapons deliveries and longer-term strategy.

articles.title: 瓦格纳集团短暂武装叛乱 普里戈任率部撤回
articles.content: 瓦格纳集团领导人普里戈任 6 月 23 日宣布发动'正义行军'，率部从乌克兰前线撤出，控制顿河畔罗斯托夫南部军区司令部，并向莫斯科方向推进。在白俄罗斯总统卢卡申科斡旋下，普里戈任同意停止行动，将瓦格纳人员撤回，本人前往白俄罗斯。两个月后，普里戈任在莫斯科至圣彼得堡的飞行中遇空难身亡。

articles.title: Wagner mutiny ends with Prigozhin agreeing to leave for Belarus
articles.content: Wagner Group chief Yevgeny Prigozhin called off his armed mutiny against Russia's military leadership after marching toward Moscow, accepting a deal brokered by Belarusian President Lukashenko. Two months later, Prigozhin was killed when his private jet crashed between Moscow and St Petersburg. The episode laid bare unprecedented strains within Russia's wartime power structures.

articles.title: Ukraine aid stalls in Congress as Republicans demand border deal
articles.content: President Biden's request for additional military aid to Ukraine remained stalled in Congress at year's end, as House Republicans demanded major changes to U.S. immigration and border policy as a condition for approval. U.S. and European officials warned that ammunition shortages on the Ukrainian front were already affecting battlefield operations, with artillery rationing reported across multiple sectors.

articles.title: 美国援乌资金法案在国会受阻 乌前线弹药短缺加剧
articles.content: 美国总统拜登提出的追加援乌资金法案在国会受阻，共和党议员要求与美墨边境政策改革挂钩，导致法案陷入僵局。美欧官员证实，乌克兰前线弹药短缺问题已影响战场行动，多个方向出现炮弹配给现象。欧洲国家承诺加大援助力度，但短期内难以填补美国援助缺口。

articles.title: 哈马斯武装人员从加沙发动大规模越境袭击 以色列宣布进入战争状态
articles.content: 10 月 7 日清晨，巴勒斯坦伊斯兰抵抗运动（哈马斯）武装人员从加沙地带发动大规模越境袭击，向以色列南部多个城镇发射数千枚火箭弹，并通过陆海空多种方式渗透以色列境内，造成大量平民伤亡，并劫持数百名人质。以色列总理内塔尼亚胡宣布以色列进入战争状态，对加沙地带实施大规模空袭。

articles.title: Hamas launches surprise attack on Israel, Israel declares war
articles.content: Hamas militants launched a sweeping, multi-front attack on Israel from the Gaza Strip, firing thousands of rockets and infiltrating Israeli territory by land, sea and air. Hundreds of Israelis were killed and more than 200 taken hostage, including civilians and soldiers. Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu declared a state of war and ordered massive airstrikes on Gaza, marking the deadliest day for Israel since the Yom Kippur War 50 years earlier.

articles.title: 以色列地面部队进入加沙北部 人道主义危机加剧
articles.content: 在持续多日的密集空袭后，以色列国防军 10 月 27 日宣布展开地面行动，地面部队大规模进入加沙北部。联合国机构警告加沙地带人道主义状况急剧恶化，水、电、燃料和食品供应严重不足，平民伤亡人数持续攀升。以色列军方称行动目标是消灭哈马斯指挥结构和救出人质，加沙卫生部门数据显示遇难人数已超过 8000 人。

articles.title: Israeli ground forces push into northern Gaza, humanitarian crisis deepens
articles.content: Israeli ground forces moved into northern Gaza in significantly larger numbers on Friday night, expanding what officials described as a 'second phase' of the war. UN agencies warned that Gaza's humanitarian situation was collapsing, with severe shortages of water, fuel, electricity and food. Palestinian health authorities reported that civilian deaths had exceeded 8,000, with thousands more buried under rubble.

articles.title: 胡塞武装袭击红海航运 全球供应链承压
articles.content: 也门胡塞武装宣称声援巴勒斯坦，对途经红海与曼德海峡的与以色列相关商船发动多次袭击。多家航运巨头宣布暂停红海航线，转而绕行非洲好望角，导致航程延长 10 至 14 天，全球海运运费指数大幅上涨。美军组建多国海上安全行动联盟应对。中国外交部呼吁各方保持克制，维护红海航行安全。

articles.title: Houthi Red Sea attacks force shipping to reroute, freight rates surge
articles.content: Major shipping companies including Maersk, Hapag-Lloyd and CMA CGM said they would pause Red Sea operations and reroute vessels around the Cape of Good Hope after Houthi attacks intensified. The diversion adds 10 to 14 days to journey times and pushed container freight rates up sharply, with the Drewry composite index climbing more than 60% in two weeks. The U.S. announced Operation Prosperity Guardian, a multinational naval mission to safeguard commercial shipping.

articles.title: 国际法院就南非诉以色列种族灭绝案开庭审理
articles.content: 联合国国际法院 1 月 11 日开始审理南非对以色列提起的诉讼，南非指控以色列在加沙的军事行动违反 1948 年《防止及惩治种族灭绝罪公约》。南非要求国际法院发布临时措施令，要求以色列立即停止对加沙的军事行动。以色列代表团出席并否认指控，称行动是针对哈马斯的合法自卫。国际法院随后部分批准南非的临时措施请求。

articles.title: ICJ to hold hearings on South Africa's genocide case against Israel
articles.content: The International Court of Justice opened hearings on South Africa's case accusing Israel of committing genocide against Palestinians in Gaza. South Africa's legal team asked the court to order Israel to immediately halt its military operations in Gaza. Israel, which rarely appears before the ICJ, mounted a vigorous defense, calling the case 'profoundly distorted' and arguing its operations are lawful self-defense against Hamas. The court subsequently issued provisional measures requiring Israel to prevent genocidal acts but did not order a ceasefire.

articles.title: 伊朗对以色列本土发动直接打击 中东局势骤然升级
articles.content: 伊朗革命卫队 4 月 13 日深夜开始向以色列本土发射数百枚无人机和弹道导弹，作为对此前以色列空袭其驻叙利亚大马士革使馆领事处导致伊朗高级军官身亡的报复。这是 1979 年以来伊朗首次从其本土对以色列发动直接军事打击。以方称在美国、约旦等盟国协助下拦截了约 99% 的来袭弹药。中东地缘局势骤然升级，引发各方对地区全面冲突的担忧。

articles.title: Iran launches massive drone and missile attack on Israel
articles.content: Iran fired hundreds of drones and missiles directly at Israeli territory in retaliation for an Israeli airstrike on Iran's consulate in Damascus that killed senior Iranian commanders. It was the first time Tehran has launched a direct military attack on Israel from its own soil. Israel said it intercepted approximately 99% of the projectiles with help from the United States, Britain, France and Jordan. Regional tensions escalated sharply, with widespread fears of broader conflict.

articles.title: 欧洲议会通过《人工智能法案》 全球首部 AI 全面立法
articles.content: 欧洲议会 3 月 13 日以压倒性多数通过《人工智能法案》。这是全球首部对人工智能进行全面监管的法律，按风险等级将 AI 系统分为不可接受风险、高风险、有限风险和最小风险四类，对不同等级的系统施加不同程度的合规要求。法案禁止使用社会评分、操控行为、远程实时生物识别等被视为不可接受风险的 AI 应用，并对通用大模型设定透明度、版权合规和系统性风险评估等要求。

articles.title: EU lawmakers approve world's first comprehensive AI law
articles.content: The European Parliament voted overwhelmingly to approve the AI Act, the world's first comprehensive legal framework regulating artificial intelligence. The law classifies AI systems by risk category—unacceptable, high, limited and minimal—imposing graduated compliance obligations. It bans certain uses such as social scoring and untargeted facial recognition, and requires general-purpose AI providers to publish summaries of training data and assess systemic risks. Companies including Google, Meta and OpenAI face new transparency and safety obligations to operate in the EU market.

articles.title: Biden Issues Sweeping Executive Order on A.I.
articles.content: President Biden signed an executive order requiring developers of large AI systems to share safety test results with the government before public release, directing the National Institute of Standards and Technology to develop standards for safety testing of AI models, and laying groundwork for new federal protections on AI-related discrimination, privacy and biosecurity risks. The order applies the Defense Production Act to require reporting from companies training models above certain compute thresholds.

articles.title: 拜登签署 AI 安全行政令 要求大模型开发者向政府报告安全测试
articles.content: 美国总统拜登 10 月 30 日签署关于 AI 安全的行政令，这是美国迄今为止最广泛的 AI 监管措施。行政令要求大型 AI 模型开发者在公开发布前向政府分享安全测试结果，授权国家标准与技术研究院（NIST）制定 AI 安全测试标准，并启动 AI 引发的歧视、隐私、生物安全风险联邦保护规则。行政令援引《国防生产法》要求达到一定算力阈值的训练模型须向政府报告。

articles.title: 首届全球 AI 安全峰会签署《布莱切利宣言》
articles.content: 首届全球人工智能安全峰会 11 月 1 日至 2 日在英国布莱切利园举行，包括中国、美国、英国、欧盟在内的 28 个国家和地区签署《布莱切利宣言》，承认前沿 AI 模型可能带来潜在严重甚至灾难性风险，承诺通过国际合作识别和应对相关风险。中国科技部副部长率团出席并发表讲话，强调中方支持在联合国框架下加强 AI 治理国际合作。

articles.title: Bletchley Declaration: 28 nations sign first global agreement on AI safety
articles.content: Twenty-eight countries including the US, China, the UK and EU member states signed the Bletchley Declaration, an agreement to work together on the risks posed by advanced AI models. The declaration acknowledges that frontier AI may pose 'serious, even catastrophic' risks. China's participation drew particular attention, with Chinese officials stressing support for AI cooperation under the United Nations framework. Critics noted the declaration is non-binding and contains no enforcement provisions.

articles.title: 《生成式人工智能服务管理暂行办法》正式发布
articles.content: 国家互联网信息办公室、国家发展和改革委员会、教育部、科学技术部、工业和信息化部、公安部、国家广播电视总局联合发布《生成式人工智能服务管理暂行办法》，自 2023 年 8 月 15 日起施行。办法共 24 条，对生成式 AI 服务提供者明确了内容合规、训练数据、算法备案、用户协议等各项要求，要求服务上线前完成安全评估和算法备案手续。

articles.title: China releases interim rules for generative AI services
articles.content: China's cyberspace regulator and six other agencies jointly issued interim measures governing generative AI services, taking effect August 15. The 24-article rules require providers of public-facing generative AI services to conduct security assessments and file algorithm records with regulators. Generated content must align with 'core socialist values' and providers must take measures to prevent discrimination, false information and infringement of intellectual property. Compared to a draft released in April, the final version eased some compliance burdens for early-stage research.

articles.title: OpenAI board fires Altman, employees revolt, Altman returns within days
articles.content: OpenAI's board of directors abruptly fired CEO Sam Altman, citing a loss of confidence in his communication with the board. The decision triggered a near-total revolt by employees, with more than 700 of OpenAI's roughly 770 staff signing a letter threatening to resign. Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella publicly offered to hire any departing employees. Within five days Altman was reinstated, the board was largely reconstituted, and Microsoft was added as a non-voting observer. The episode prompted broad debate over governance of frontier AI labs.

articles.title: OpenAI 治理风波震动全球科技业 Altman 五日内复职
articles.content: OpenAI 董事会 11 月 17 日突然宣布解雇首席执行官山姆·奥特曼（Sam Altman），称对其与董事会沟通的诚信失去信心。决定引发员工大规模抗议，逾 700 名员工联名信威胁集体辞职转投微软。微软 CEO 纳德拉公开承诺接收任何流出员工。五天内奥特曼复职，董事会基本重组，微软成为无投票权观察员。事件引发外界对前沿 AI 公司治理结构和安全监督机制的广泛讨论。

articles.title: COP28 达成历史性'转型脱离化石燃料'共识
articles.content: 在阿联酋迪拜举行的《联合国气候变化框架公约》第二十八次缔约方大会（COP28）经过加时谈判后达成最终决议。决议首次明确承诺'以公正、有序、公平的方式转型脱离化石燃料能源系统'，并设定 2030 年前全球可再生能源装机容量增加两倍、能效翻番的目标。中国代表团表示，这一成果体现各方的最大公约数，未来需在共同但有区别责任原则下落实。

articles.title: Cop28 climate deal calls for 'transitioning away' from fossil fuels
articles.content: Nearly 200 countries at the Cop28 climate summit in Dubai reached a final agreement that for the first time explicitly calls for 'transitioning away from fossil fuels in energy systems, in a just, orderly and equitable manner'. The deal also set goals to triple global renewable energy capacity and double energy efficiency by 2030. While stronger language calling for 'phase-out' was rejected, climate negotiators called the deal historic given the host country's role as a major oil producer.

articles.title: 欧盟 CBAM 进入过渡期 中国出口企业面临碳成本核算挑战
articles.content: 欧盟碳边境调节机制（CBAM）从 10 月 1 日起进入过渡期，覆盖钢铁、铝、水泥、化肥、电力和氢六大类产品的进口商需要按季度向欧盟报告嵌入产品中的温室气体排放量。过渡期内不需缴费，但 2026 年正式实施后将根据进口商品的碳含量征收相应费用。中国是受影响最大的非欧盟国家之一，相关行业企业正加紧建立产品碳足迹核算体系。

articles.title: EU's carbon border tax enters trial phase
articles.content: The European Union's Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM) entered its transitional phase on Sunday, requiring importers of steel, aluminum, cement, fertilizers, electricity and hydrogen to report embedded emissions on a quarterly basis. No payments are due during the transitional period, but from 2026 importers will face charges based on the carbon content of goods. China, India, Turkey and South Korea are among the most affected exporters, with industry groups raising concerns about reporting complexity and competitive impact.

articles.title: 中国可再生能源装机容量历史性超过煤电
articles.content: 国家能源局发布数据显示，截至 2024 年 5 月底，中国可再生能源累计装机容量首次超过煤电，达到约 14.5 亿千瓦。其中风电装机 4.6 亿千瓦，太阳能发电装机 6.9 亿千瓦。中国连续多年保持太阳能和风电新增装机全球第一。能源转型加速推进的同时，电力系统调节能力建设和新能源消纳成为重点关注问题。

articles.title: China's Renewable Energy Capacity Surpasses Coal for First Time
articles.content: China's installed renewable energy capacity surpassed coal-fired generation for the first time, reaching about 1.45 terawatts according to the National Energy Administration. The shift, driven by record annual additions of solar and wind capacity, marks a milestone for the world's largest emitter. Analysts caution that capacity does not directly translate to electricity output, as renewables operate at lower utilization rates, but the trend underscores the pace of China's energy transition.

articles.title: Biden Signs Inflation Reduction Act, Largest U.S. Climate Investment
articles.content: President Biden signed the Inflation Reduction Act into law, including roughly $369 billion in climate and clean energy investments—the largest U.S. climate spending package ever. The law provides expanded tax credits for electric vehicles, batteries, solar, wind, hydrogen and other clean energy technologies, with significant domestic content requirements. European officials and other trading partners raised concerns about the local content provisions, which they said amount to discriminatory subsidies.

articles.title: 美国 IRA 法案掀起清洁能源投资潮 引发国际贸易争议
articles.content: 美国《通胀削减法案》（IRA）正式生效，其中约 3690 亿美元用于气候和清洁能源相关投资，包括电动汽车、电池、太阳能、风能、绿氢等领域的税收抵免和直接补贴。法案对本土制造和采购设有严格要求，被欧盟、韩国等盟友视为带有歧视性的产业政策。欧盟随后启动'绿色协议工业计划'回应，全球清洁能源产业政策竞争加剧。
